# ANNAISI / ANNICE Sleep

Official website: https://annicehome.com/

ANNAISI is the export brand of Guangdong Ailisi Furniture Co., Ltd. The factory focuses on OEM and ODM roll packed mattresses, compressed mattresses, compressed sofas, sofa beds, and private label furniture programs for international B2B buyers.

Primary products:
- Roll packed mattress
- Pocket spring mattress
- Memory foam mattress
- Hybrid mattress
- Compressed sofa
- Sofa bed

Target buyers:
- Importers
- Furniture distributors
- Retail chains
- E-commerce sellers
- Private label brands
- Hotel and project buyers

Important pages:
- https://annicehome.com/roll-packed-mattress-manufacturer/
- https://annicehome.com/compressed-sofa-manufacturer/
- https://annicehome.com/oem-mattress-manufacturer/
- https://annicehome.com/private-label-mattress-manufacturer/
- https://annicehome.com/products/
- https://annicehome.com/factory/
- https://annicehome.com/contact/

Factory address:
ANNICE Sleep, No. 8 Mingxing Road, Chenyong Industrial Zone, Longjiang Town, Shunde District, Foshan City, Guangdong Province, China.
